texto: Keep it simple, stupid. Good game design shouldn't keep you looking at the manual but should have enough depth where you feel like you bring something new to the game every time you play.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Rob Manuel: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Keep it simple, stupid. Good game design shouldn't keep you looking at the manual but should have…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, time, good pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de good e simple.

texto: Sometimes it's not always about what you can see or hear but what's under the hood of a game that's most impressive. Between those thousands and thousands of lines of code, magic happens. Sometimes the most amazing feats of gaming wizardry happen without you even noticing.
explicacao: Citação de Rob Manuel sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Sometimes it's not always about what you can see or hear but what's under the hood of a game that…” articula tempo, game, magic em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como magic e you.
